title: Site Brief
description: Phase 1 Understand artefact: structured business/site brief produced by briefModel (or its mock fallback). Locked by ADR 0013 before Sprint 2B wires planningModel.

runId.description: Engine Run identifier the brief belongs to.

rawPrompt.description: The original prompt as briefModel saw it. May include language hint preamble.

businessTypeGuess.description: Short slug describing the business (e.g. 'electrician', 'photo-studio'). Null when ambiguous.

companyName.description: Company or brand name if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

pageCount.description: Number of pages briefModel inferred. Null when not derivable.

targetAudience.description: Who the site is meant to convert.

requestedCapabilities.description: Capability slugs the user explicitly asked for (e.g. 'contact-form', 'reviews'). Lookup target for capability-map.v1.

locationHint.description: City or region if mentioned. Free-form string, may include country.

contactPhone.description: Phone number if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

contactEmail.description: Email address if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

contactAddress.description: Street/postal address if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

contactOpeningHours.description: Opening hours if explicitly mentioned in the prompt (free-form natural-language string, prompt's original language). Null when absent.

contentDepth.description: How detailed the copy should feel.

sourceModelRole.description: Locked: this artefact is always written by the briefModel role.

modelUsed.description: Concrete model identifier (e.g. 'gpt-5.4') or 'mock' when fallback ran.

briefSource.description: Truth field about which code path produced this brief. Never claims 'real' when fallback ran.

briefError.description: Error message when briefSource indicates a fallback path. Null on success or no-key path.

attemptedModel.description: Model that was attempted before LLM-error fallback. Null when no LLM call was attempted.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the brief was written.

scaffoldHint.description: Optional scaffold suggestion the builder attaches when running from a Project Input. Not produced by dev_generate.py.

businessFacts.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton, see docs/heavy-llm-flow/01). Separates confirmed facts from deliberate unknowns so downstream renderer/verifier never invent copy. No model fills it in kor-1a; briefModel fills it in kor-1b.

facts.description: Confirmed facts derived from prompt/wizard/scrape (e.g. 'serves Malmö', 'family-run since 2008').

unknowns.description: Deliberately unknown slots (e.g. 'telefon', 'certifieringar'). Honesty engine: an item here must never be rendered as invented copy (ties to contact_placeholders, B158/B159).

positioning.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton). How the site should position the business. No model fills it in kor-1a; briefModel fills it in kor-1b.

differentiator.description: What sets the business apart, in plain language.

audienceNeed.description: The core need the target audience has.

tone.description: Free-form tone phrase for positioning copy (distinct from the top-level tone[] tone words).

avoid.description: Things the copy must avoid (e.g. 'pahittade certifieringar', 'generiska superlativ').

contentStrategy.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton). High-level content strategy for the site. No model fills it in kor-1a; briefModel fills it in kor-1b.

heroAngle.description: Angle the hero section should take.

trustStrategy.description: How trust is built honestly, without fake claims.

avoidGenericClaims.description: When true, generic superlatives/claims should be avoided.

conversion.description: Optional blueprint field (kor-1a skeleton). Conversion intent that binds to the deterministic contact/CTA rules. No model fills it in kor-1a; briefModel fills it in kor-1b.

primaryCta.description: Label for the primary call to action.

secondaryCta.description: Label for the secondary call to action.

ctaRules.description: Honesty/availability rules for CTAs (e.g. 'do not show phone if missing', 'no booking unless booking exists').
